mnemonics.title: LIFO Principle
mnemonics.content: Last In, First Out - Like a stack of plates: Last plate placed is First one removed

mnemonics.title: Stack Operations
mnemonics.content: PUSH - Put Up Stack Here, POP - Pull Off Please

mnemonics.title: Error Conditions
mnemonics.content: OVERflow - too many PUSHes, UNDERflow - too many POPs

mnemonics.title: Array Implementation
mnemonics.content: TOP starts at -1: Think 'minus one means empty done'
